mapper.select: SELECT review_id, content, rating, image_org, image_new, visited_at, visited_time_zone, created_at, content_id, user_id, reservation_id FROM review WHERE review_id = #{review_id}
SELECT review_id, content, rating, image_org, image_new, visited_at, visited_time_zone, created_at, content_id, user_id, reservation_id FROM review WHERE user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT review_id, content, rating, image_org, image_new, visited_at, visited_time_zone, created_at, content_id, user_id, reservation_id FROM review WHERE content_id = #{content_id}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY rating DESC, created_at DESC
ORDER BY rating ASC, created_at DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT review_id, content, rating, image_org, image_new, visited_at, visited_time_zone, created_at, content_id, user_id, reservation_id FROM review ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_reviews, IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0) as avg_rating, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_5, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_4, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_3, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_2, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_1 FROM review WHERE content_id = #{content_id}

SELECT visited_time_zone, COUNT(*) as review_count, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review WHERE content_id = #{content_id} AND visited_at IS NOT NULL AND visited_time_zone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY visited_time_zone ORDER BY visited_time_zone
